title: [Triage] Forum #1448-#1454 + GitHub activity Feb 2025
excerpt:
## Forum Posts #1448-#1454 Triage

### #1448 Lasse_K - Contact sensor installs as unknown (v5.11.14)
- dlnraja responded: asking for manufacturer name, interview, diag log
- **Status**: Waiting for user info

### #1450 Hartmut_Dunker - TS0726/_TZ3002_pzao9ls1 move request
- Wants FP moved to wall_switch_4gang_1way
- dlnraja responded: special driver for packetninja, will consider later
- **Status**: Deferred

### #1453 Franklin_Marlin - Tuya Zigbee PC switch not found
- Got email that device is supported but cannot find it in app
- No fingerprint provided yet
- **Status**: Needs response - ask for device interview

---
## GitHub Issues Review

### dlnraja #129 - Curtain Motor TS130F/_TZ3000_5iixzdo7
- Already supported in curtain_motor driver
- User reports it pairs but missing features
- Action: Ask for diagnostic logs to identify missing DPs

### dlnraja #128 - Garage Door _TZE204_nklqjk62 / TS0601
- Already supported in door_controller driver
- User reports it pairs but missing features
- Action: Ask for diagnostic logs

---

diagComments.excerpt:
<!-- tuya-issue-manager -->
## Triage Summary for Forum Posts #1448-#1454 and GitHub Issues

### Forum Posts

#### #1448 Lasse_K - Contact sensor installs as unknown (v5.11.14)
- **Status**: Waiting for user info. Please provide the manufacturer name and any diagnostic logs to assist in identifying the issue.

#### #1450 Hartmut_Dunker - TS0726/_TZ3002_pzao9ls1 move request
- **Status**: Deferred. This fingerprint is currently associated with a special driver for packetninja. Further consideration will be given later.

#### #1453 Franklin_Marlin - Tuya Zigbee PC switch not found
- **Status**: Needs response. Please conduct a device interview using the [Homey Developer Tools](https://tools.developer.homey.app) to gather more information about the device.

---

### GitHub Issues Review

#### dlnraja #129 - Curtain Motor TS130F/_TZ3000_5iixzdo7
- **Status**: Supported in the `curtain_motor` driver. Please provide diagnostic logs to identify any missing features.

#### dlnraja #128 - Garage Door _TZE204_nklqjk62 / TS0601
- **Status**: Supported in the `door_controller` driver. Please provide diagnostic logs to identify any missing features.

---

### Summary of Fingerprints from JohanBendz Issues
